titleStmt.title: SII 15.609: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 609. (B.K. No. 1 of 1926-27.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the maṇḍapa of the Trikūṭēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1148, Pārthiva, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Vaḍḍavāra, corresponding to 1225 A.D., April 12. The Śaka year was current.

It records the gift of two golden banners to the god Svayaṁbhu Trikūṭēśvara by Chaṇḍauvve, the daughter (i.e. disciple) of Sidhānti-Kriyāśakti-paṇḍita and wife of Mallaya who was the Paṭṭasāhaṇi of Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Mallidēva, the Kadamba faudatory of Hāngal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastiśrī śakavaruṣada 1148 neya pārtthiva saṁvatsarada
vaiśākha śuddha 3 vaḍḍanāra rōhiṇī nakṣatra śōbhenayō
gadaṁdu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kādaṁba kuḷakamaḷa
mārttaṁḍa banavāsipuravarādhīśvara jayaṁti madhukēśva
radēvalabdhavaraprasādanumappa mallidēvarasara pra
dhāna ghōḍeyarāya paṭṭasāhaṇi mallayya
na heṁḍati śrīmatsiddhāṁtikriyāśaktipaṁḍi
ta dēvara magaḷu pātracūḍāmaṇi caṁḍauvve śrī
svayaṁbhu trikūṭēśvara dēvarige taṁna dharmma kīrttigaḷaṁ
teraḍusuvarṇna dhvajava māḍisi koṭṭaḷu . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.609 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
